name: Gwen Moore
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $196,423 for Gwen Moore in U.S. House, WI-04. Public statements and congressional records indicate this candidate has taken a stance aligned with Israel-focused security policy framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
